creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Tue, 16 Oct 2012, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/172797 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/172797

Hi,

As described at http://owl.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html
certain releases of Exiftool are designated as 'production releases' and 
others as 'development releases'.

There are two ports in the ports tree for Exiftool, 
graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool, which tracks production releases, and 
graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel, which tracks development releases.

Since 9.03 is a development release (latest production release is 9.01) 
this update should be made to graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel instead of 
graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.

For that reason, I do not approve this update.

I will be submitting an update to graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool to update it 
to 9.01 shortly.

Thanks,

Tod McQuillin
